query:
INSERT INTO secure_documents (
  ownerId,
  entityId,
  folderId,
  documentType,
  title,
  description,
  fileName,
  fileUrl,
  fileSize,
  mimeType,
  content,
  version,
  status,
  isTemplate,
  accessLevel,
  blockchainHash
) VALUES (
  1,
  1,
  NULL,
  'other',
  'What Is The LuvOnPurpose System? - Plain Language Explanation',
  'A simple, easy-to-understand explanation of the LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System for family members, partners, and anyone who wants to understand what we have built.',
  'What_Is_The_LuvOnPurpose_System_Plain_Language.md',
  '/documents/trust/What_Is_The_LuvOnPurpose_System_Plain_Language.md',
  12000,
  'text/markdown',
  NULL,
  1,
  'final',
  0,
  'owner_only',
  NULL
);
